LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT XUE HU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473.5, 473(D) IS CONTINUED TO MAY 13, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 24, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473.5, 473(D)
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JILL BATES-MOORE, ESQ., 510.985.9250, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT XUE HU'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Pursuant To CCP 473.5, 473(D) is granted. (CCP 473.5.) The motion is timely from the entry of default judgment against Defendant. Plaintiff did not have actual notice of this action. Defendant is granted 30 days leave to file her responsive pleading. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473.5, 473(D)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT XUE HU'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Pursuant To CCP 473.5, 473(D) is continued to May 13, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 24, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
